title: JSONPlaceholder input API document
prompt: Create an MCP Server from the provided JSONPlaceholder API documentation. Preserve all documented request and response shapes. JSONPlaceholder write operations are fake test operations and do not persist data.

probes.prompt: Use the active MCP tool named "{toolName}" to list JSONPlaceholder posts. If arguments are needed, use userId=1. Return a compact answer with at least one post id or title.
Use the active MCP tool named "{toolName}" to fetch JSONPlaceholder post id 1. Return the post id or title.
Use the active MCP tool named "{toolName}" to create a fake JSONPlaceholder post with title="benchmark", body="tool call", and userId=1. Return the created id or title.
Use the active MCP tool named "{toolName}" to replace fake JSONPlaceholder post id 1 with title="updated", body="updated body", and userId=1. Return the updated id or title.
Use the active MCP tool named "{toolName}" to patch fake JSONPlaceholder post id 1 with title="patched title". Return the updated id or title.
Use the active MCP tool named "{toolName}" to delete fake JSONPlaceholder post id 1. Return the delete response or status.
Use the active MCP tool named "{toolName}" to fetch comments for JSONPlaceholder postId=1 or post id 1. Return a compact answer with at least one email or comment id.
Use the active MCP tool named "{toolName}" to fetch JSONPlaceholder user id 1. Return the user's name or username.

title: DummyJSON input API document
prompt: Create an MCP Server from the provided DummyJSON API documentation. Preserve all documented request and response shapes. DummyJSON write operations are fake test operations and do not persist data.

probes.prompt: Use the active MCP tool named "{toolName}" to list DummyJSON posts with limit=3 and skip=0 if supported. Return at least one post id or title.
Use the active MCP tool named "{toolName}" to fetch DummyJSON post id 1. Return the post id or title.
Use the active MCP tool named "{toolName}" to search DummyJSON posts with q="love". Return at least one matched post id or title.
Use the active MCP tool named "{toolName}" to list DummyJSON posts for userId=5. Return at least one post id or title.
Use the active MCP tool named "{toolName}" to fetch DummyJSON comments for post id 1. Return at least one comment id or body.
Use the active MCP tool named "{toolName}" to create a fake DummyJSON post with title="benchmark", body="tool call", and userId=5. Return the created id or title.
Use the active MCP tool named "{toolName}" to patch fake DummyJSON post id 1 with title="patched title". Return the updated id or title.
Use the active MCP tool named "{toolName}" to delete fake DummyJSON post id 1. Return the delete response or status.

title: PokeAPI input API document
prompt: Create an MCP Server from the provided PokeAPI documentation. Preserve all documented request and response shapes. All documented PokeAPI endpoints are public read-only GET requests.

probes.prompt: Use the active MCP tool named "{toolName}" to list Pokemon with limit=5 and offset=0 if supported. Return at least one Pokemon name.
Use the active MCP tool named "{toolName}" to fetch the Pokemon named pikachu. Return the Pokemon name, id, or type.
Use the active MCP tool named "{toolName}" to fetch the PokeAPI ability named stench. Return the ability name or id.
Use the active MCP tool named "{toolName}" to fetch the PokeAPI type named fire. Return the type name or damage relation summary.
Use the active MCP tool named "{toolName}" to fetch the PokeAPI move named pound. Return the move name, power, or type.
Use the active MCP tool named "{toolName}" to fetch the PokeAPI item named master-ball. Return the item name, id, or cost.
Use the active MCP tool named "{toolName}" to fetch the PokeAPI berry named cheri. Return the berry name or id.
Use the active MCP tool named "{toolName}" to fetch PokeAPI generation-i. Return the generation name, id, or main region.
